name: Almond Glazed Poppy Seed Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients and beat with a mixer for 2 minutes.
2. Pour the batter into 2 large or 5 small greased loaf pans.
3. Bake large loaves for 1 hour, or smaller ones for about 25 minutes, until golden brown.
4. Cool for 10 minutes, then remove from pans.
5. To make almond glaze, mix ingredients together until sugar dissolves.
6. Spoon the glaze generously over the tops and sides of the bread.
7. Allow to cool completely before wrapping in foil to store or freeze.
8. Use a 350°F oven for best results.
This freezes nicely and can easily be stored for when you need a quick dessert or sweet cake with coffee or tea. Enjoy!
